name: automatic_invoice_payment_16
description: Automatic invoice payment reminder with due and processing date

input.subject: Payment Scheduled
input.snippet: Your automatic payment for the attached invoice is scheduled to be processed on 06/24/26.
input.body_text:
Just a reminder that your automatic payment for the attached invoice is scheduled to be processed on 06/24/26.

Due date: 06/24/26
Account: ending 4321
Amount: $59.99

No action is needed. Your saved payment method will be charged automatically.

notes: Production regression: Outlook trace returned an empty model response for this no-event pattern
